nasb.text: and Peleg lived two hundred and nine years after he became the father of Reu, and he had other sons and daughters.

esv.text: And Peleg lived after he fathered Reu 209 years and had other sons and daughters.

cnv.text: 法勒生拉吳以後，又活了二百零九年，並且生了其他的兒女。

ccb.text: 之后又活了二百零九年，生儿育女。

csbs.text: 法勒生了拉吴之后，又活了两百零九年，并且生了其他的儿女。
